title: Indonesia raises rates in surprise move as rupiah lingers near record lows
summary_full: In a statement, the central bank said this was also a "pre-emptive measure" to maintain inflation within the government's target range of 1.5% to 3.5%.
summary_public: In a statement, the central bank said this was also a "pre-emptive measure" to maintain inflation within the government's target range of 1.5% to 3.5%.
